mermaidSyntax:
classDiagram
    class SequenceData {
        +fastq_files
        +quality_scores
        +read_length
        +trim_adapters()
        +filter_quality()
    }
    
    class Aligner {
        +reference_genome
        +index_path
        +align(SequenceData)
        +generate_bam()
    }
    
    class VariantCaller {
        +min_quality
        +min_depth
        +call_variants(bam_file)
        +filter_variants()
    }
    
    class Annotation {
        +database
        +version
        +annotate_variants(vcf_file)
        +predict_impact()
    }
    
    class QualityReport {
        +metrics
        +pass_threshold
        +generate_report()
        +visualize()
    }
    
    SequenceData ..> Aligner : uses
    Aligner ..> VariantCaller : produces BAM
    VariantCaller ..> Annotation : produces VCF
    QualityReport ..> SequenceData : aggregates
    QualityReport ..> Aligner : aggregates
    QualityReport ..> VariantCaller : aggregates
    QualityReport ..> Annotation : aggregates
